1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons (stormflo200ar_klimaarna) geometry and id

3.description: reduce storm-surge polygons to Kristiansand extent

4.description: get buildings in Kristiansand with representation point and attributes

5.description: find buildings within 50m of reduced storm-surge polygons (dwithin)

6.description: compute distances between matched buildings and storm-surge polygons

7.description: get minimum distance per building and include municipality name

10.description: find county containing the municipality and get fylkesnavn

2.description: get buildings in the municipality using kommunenummer from step 1

3.description: get 200-year storm-flood polygons intersecting the municipality extent from step 1

4.description: get county polygon(s) that intersect the municipality from step 1
